title: 3 Bedroom Penthouse with private Rooftop Terrace
description: This property offers a comfortable and convenient stay, equipped with everything you need for both short and long visits. Each room features a king-size bed, air conditioning, and a flat-screen TV, ensuring a relaxing and enjoyable atmosphere. Guests can stay connected with fast WiFi throughout the property and enjoy the reliability of 24-hour electricity. For added convenience, a washing machine is available on-site, making it easy to handle longer stays. The property also provides free, private, and secure parking, giving you peace of mind if you’re traveling with a vehicle. Perfect for business travelers, families, or couples, this home combines comfort, modern amenities, and practicality for an enjoyable stay. Guests have full access to a range of relaxing and entertaining spaces throughout the property. Enjoy the swimming pool, perfect for cooling off or spending a sunny afternoon lounging by the water. The beautifully maintained garden offers a peaceful spot to unwind, read a book, or simply enjoy the fresh air. For those who love outdoor cooking and gatherings, the BBQ area is available to prepare delicious meals and host memorable evenings with family and friends. I'm looking forward to welcoming you! Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions leading up to your stay.
